# Forgo Cloud Topology

Parent: `open-source/gnosis/topologies`

Formal app topology for the forgo.cloud reskin. These GG modules model the
prototype screens, clicks, reusable component coverage, API contracts, error
recovery states, user stories, and Playwright paths before implementation moves into
`apps/aeon-forge` or `apps/forgo-cloud-worker`.

## Files

- `forgo_cloud_app.gg` - route and screen composition topology.
- `forgo_cloud_components.gg` - component coverage topology for the prototype.
- `forgo_cloud_buttons.gg` - recursive button and button-group topology.
- `forgo_cloud_cards.gg` - recursive card/panel-group topology.
- `forgo_cloud_navigation.gg` - recursive navigation topology for nav chrome, tabs, sidebars, and trees.
- `forgo_cloud_collections.gg` - recursive collection topology for lists, tables, and typed repeated data.
- `forgo_cloud_interactions.gg` - click and user-flow topology.
- `forgo_cloud_interactions_proof.gg` - connected Betty proof boundary for the interaction inventory lifecycle.
- `forgo_cloud_data_contracts.gg` - data/API contract topology.
- `forgo_cloud_errors.gg` - screen-level error and recovery topology.
- `forgo_cloud_user_stories.gg` - executable product story topology.
- `forgo_cloud_playwright_paths.gg` - Playwright path topology derived from stories.
- `forgo_cloud_generation.gg` - downstream story and Playwright generation topology.
- `forgo_cloud.test.gg` - verification suite for all modules.
